arts.ttl: How to watch Crystal Palace vs Arsenal - TV channel, live stream & kick-off time
arts.sum: Here, football.london takes a look at the TV info needed to be able to follow Arsenal's Premier League fixture against Crystal Palace. With Sky Sports broadcasting Crystal Palace vs Arsenal, there are a host of streaming options available for the fixture.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace already in talks with player and club over transfer – ‘Opened the door’ to January addition
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are eyeing a move for Benfica winger Jan-Niklas Beste in the January transfer window. That’s according to journalist Sacha Tavolieri writing for Sky Sports Switzerland, who reports that Crystal Palace have ‘fallen under the spell’ of the German midfielder. He states that Crystal Palace are looking to add a left-winger to their squad The post Crystal Palace already in talks with player and club over transfer – ‘Opened the door’ to January addition appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Crystal Palace host Arsenal in the Premier League this evening as they search for revenge against the Gunners. The Eagles were knocked out of the Carabao Cup quarter-finals by Arsenal in midweek, after a narrow 3-2 loss at the Emirates. Gabriel Jesus netted a hat-trick for Arsenal after Jean-Philippe Mateta had given the visitors an […] The post Crystal Palace vs Arsenal – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man United 'make Marcus Rashford loan decision' amid Arsenal, Chelsea speculation
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly willing to let Marcus Rashford leave on loan in January but will not sanction a move to a Premier League club.
